title: Aishwarya Samanta joins Dentons Link Legal as Associate Partner
description: Aishwarya Samanta has joined Dentons Link Legal as an Associate Partner in Banking & Finance Practice at the Firm's Delhi office.Samanta is a 2014 graduate of UPES.She advises banks, financial institutions and funds on complex financing transactions across structures and lending arrangements. Her experience spans project finance, private credit and direct lending, structured lending, debt restructuring, and external commercial borrowings, with a focus on renewable energy, power, infrastructu
